allow: Bash(py -c "from sqlalchemy import create_engine, text; from database import DATABASE_URL; engine = create_engine\(DATABASE_URL\); conn = engine.connect\(\); result = conn.execute\(text\('SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = '\\''course'\\'''\)\); print\([row[0] for row in result]\)")

Bash(py -c "from models import Course; from database import SessionLocal; db = SessionLocal\(\); courses = db.query\(Course\).filter\(Course.c_semester == 1, Course.is_active == True\).all\(\); print\(f'Found {len\(courses\)} active courses for semester 1'\); db.close\(\)")
